microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation standard.
Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly expanding customer-facing solution delivery throughput.
microsoft_2023: Championed **AI-driven adoption** for code generation workflows, conducting live demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Mapped business needs to platform capabilities by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams, influencing the roadmap to prioritize intent-based YAML generation based on validated customer gaps.

Improved solution scalability by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting stakeholder lookup time by 83% and accelerating partner onboarding.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams.
Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths and eliminate recurring operational toil.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments in platform scalability.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations.
Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing integration risk.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process for a large-scale robotics platform.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by managing end-to-end scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals through an optimized CRM process, improving customer-facing workflows and conversion rates.
Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile for local search.
Improved leadership pricing models by conducting profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying and sealing margin leaks to increase per-job contribution.

tailoring_notes: Wove in 'AI agent' (JD: voice AI agent / AI offerings) explicitly in microsoft_ft bullet 5 and microsoft_2023 bullet 3 to mirror Assort's core product vocabulary.

Used 'discovery interviews' and 'map business needs to platform capabilities' in microsoft_2023 bullet 2 — directly mirrors JD language 'map business needs to technical solutions' and 'trusted advisor' framing.

Surfaced 'customer-facing solution delivery' and 'partner onboarding' in microsoft_ft bullet 5 and microsoft_2023 bullet 3 to echo JD's 'seamless deployment and adoption' and 'external partners' language.
Framed microsoft_2022 roadmap bullet around 'automate critical paths / operational toil' to mirror JD's healthcare admin automation mission ('$1.1 trillion on administration instead of care').
Skills section leads with 'AI Agents & Voice AI Workflows' and 'Pre-Sales & Solutions Engineering' to front-load the two most explicit JD requirements for recruiter eye-scan.
